How it works

From your wall to a woven piece

Three steps stand between a bare wall and a finished, hand-knotted piece made for it.

01 — Upload

Photograph your wall

A single photo is enough. Natural light gives the most accurate colour read.

02 — Analyze

AI reads colour & texture

Our engine studies wall tone, lighting and texture, and factors in the piece type you want.

03 — Preview

See it before you buy

Place the recommended design on your own wall photo with our preview tool, then order.

The collection

Rope, knotted by hand

Shop

The full Hastakala collection

Every piece is hand-knotted to order. Filter by category, then tap "Design for my wall" to run it through the AI studio.

AI Design Studio

Let the wall choose the weave

Upload a photo of the wall, set your preferences, and our vision model will analyze colour, texture and light to recommend a specific design.

1

Upload your wall

Click to upload a photo of your wall

JPG or PNG · analyzed only in this session

2

Tell us what you're picturing

3

Get your recommendation

Your AI recommendation will appear here — dominant wall colour, texture read, and the specific design our engine suggests.

Wall Preview · AR-style

See it on your wall first

Drag, scale and blend a piece onto your own wall photo before you order.

Upload a wall photo to begin the preview

Placement controls

Tip: drag the piece directly on the photo to reposition it horizontally.

This is an image-composite preview to gauge scale, colour and placement — not a live camera AR view. A production build would add device-camera WebXR placement and automatic wall segmentation.
